pageContext.name: Friday the 13th Jason Mask Light
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Paladone are excited to present the Friday the 13th Jason Mask Light!  During the events of Friday the 13th Part III, Jason Voorhees takes a hockey mask from a victim to hide his face as he continues his killing spree. It is the design of that iconic mask that has been used for this amazing light.  Standing 8.6' tall, this awesome Friday the 13th Mask Light can be powered by either the USB cable that is included, or for complete portability you can use three (3) AAA batteries (not included). Plus, it can be used as a free-standing light or mounted to the wall.  This Mask Light is perfect for any Friday the 13th or horror movie fan, so don't miss your chance to add this to your horror collection today!
